name: DOG® – The dog takes the hindmost
short_description: Looks like Ludo, but it's DOG®. In this game, you also have to safely bring your four game pieces into your home area. The difference is that they are moved using cards that have a few surprises in store for you. Team spirit is important, because you can only win together.
detailed_description:
The dog takes the hindmost!
Looks like Ludo, but it's DOG®. In this game, you also have to safely bring your four game pieces into your home area. The difference is that they are moved using cards that have a few surprises in store for you. Team spirit is important, because you can only win together.

Highlights:
  • Different game modes
  • For uo to 6 players
  • Game boards with different looks

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Russian
